[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101111110 7
1 011111000 5
2 000011101 4
3 110011111 7
4 101011110 6
5 110111110 7
6 110101111 7
7 011111111 8
